title: centaurea regia var. cynarocephala
intro: Centaurea regia var. cynarocephala, also known as the Cineraria or Bachelor's Button, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant is also known for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Centaurea regia var. cynarocephala are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including colds, coughs, and skin irritations.
